description_long: This shotgun features a futuristic, tactical design with a robust, angular frame and a dark metallic finish accented by copper or bronze lines. The body is constructed with multiple panels, visible screws, and reinforced sections, suggesting durability and advanced engineering. The barrel assembly is compact and squared, with dual tubes and a vented shroud, while the receiver area is detailed with mechanical elements and a prominent circular component. The grip is ergonomic, textured for secure handling, and paired with a trigger guard that is rounded and reinforced. The stock is a pistol grip type, integrated into the main body for a compact profile. Overall, the shotgun exudes a high-tech, urban combat aesthetic suitable for modern or near-future settings.
description: A futuristic, tactical shotgun with a dark metallic body, copper accents, and a compact, angular design featuring a pistol grip and dual-barrel assembly.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the copper-accented panels, ergonomic pistol grip, and detailed barrel assembly.
description_view_1: Narrow edge-on view, revealing the slim profile and thickness of the shotgun without visible details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the mechanical details, grip, and barrel structure.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, showing the thinness of the shotgun and minimal surface features.
attribute_barrel_configuration: dual-barrel, parallel configuration with vented shroud and compact length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with reinforced edges and smooth contour
